creator: kanou@mil.allnet.ne.jp
text:
Master site of japanese/xjman moved the location of distribution.

Fix: 

MAINTAINER?=   sada@FreeBSD.org--WIPOwphAqRJNEJWN8kSp3KavwvMpFJNwHUjxkaTPuKMVpzLW
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile~   Sun Aug 12 02:39:20 2001
+++ Makefile    Mon Aug 13 13:18:29 2001
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 PORTVERSION?=  0.6
 CATEGORIES=    japanese
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP} \
-               http://xjman.dsl.gr.jp/
+               http://xjman.dsl.gr.jp/dist/
